description: Space arcade with 3 enemy types, power-ups, combo scoring, particle effects, and neon-glow visuals
prompt: Build a colorful space invaders arcade game with HTML5 canvas. Include particle effects on explosions, multiple enemy types (3 kinds with different movement patterns), power-up drops (rapid fire, shield, spread shot), combo scoring system for consecutive kills, neon glow visual effects, wave progression with increasing difficulty. Mobile touch support. Dark theme with cyan player, orange/purple/green enemies.

tasks.subject: Create game canvas, player, and controls
Create enemy types and wave system
Create styling with neon arcade theme
